title: Lippincott - Associate, Brand Strategy
description: Company: Lippincott Description: As part of the Brand Strategy team at Lippincott, you will play an integral role in solving complex brand challenges for ambitious companies, partnering with teams across the firm to create and bring solutions to life through strategy, experience, marketing, and design. You will apply analytical and creative thinking in everything you do to tackle transformative initiatives for clients. Get ready to consult globally across industries on a range of branding challenges, including brand positioning, messaging, brand architecture, naming, and marketing and customer strategy. As an Associate, you will be responsible for clear and rigorous evaluations of client situations that inform compelling strategic solutions. You will be viewed as an authority on research findings and implications, with the team looking to you for create hypotheses and recommendations—varying from breakthrough big brand ideas to elegant architecture models and more. You will also lead as a people and work plan manager, driving the team’s content creation. title: Principal Brand Designer
description: We are open to remote candidates located within PST to BRT time zones. At Metalab, we design some of the world’s most beloved products. Founders at early-stage startups hire us to help build businesses from scratch, and leaders at global enterprises hire us to help launch new products. As a Principal Brand Designer, you will set the creative vision for brands, driving excellence in brand identity, marketing, and storytelling. You’ll guide clients and internal teams through the brand design process, ensuring our work is both visually stunning and strategically impactful. You’ll play a key role in shaping how Metalab and our clients' brands come to life across digital experiences, bringing a systems-thinking approach to branding that integrates seamlessly with product design. You’ll act as a brand leader, advocating for design excellence while collaborating across disciplines to build brands that don’t just look great—they enhance user experiences and drive business impact. What you’ll do: Lead the brand design process from concept to execution, setting the creative and strategic vision for brands. Develop inspiring, relevant, and scalable brand identities that strengthen digital products and businesses. Act as a trusted partner to clients and internal teams, educating them on brand best practices and guiding them through a rigorous but agile branding process. Work closely with Product Designers, Product Managers, and Client Partners to ensure brand identity aligns seamlessly with product experiences. Advocate for brand thinking across the organization, increasing brand literacy within our teams and clients. Deliver polished, well-documented brand systems that serve as an enduring source of truth for internal and external teams. Push creative boundaries, exploring motion, 3D, and interactive elements to elevate brand experiences. Present, sell, and defend creative work to stakeholders, ensuring buy-in and alignment at every stage of the process. What we’re looking for: 7+ years of experience in brand design, marketing, or visual identity, with a portfolio showcasing brand identities that live in digital environments. Proven expertise in translating brand strategy into compelling visual identities, design systems, and marketing materials. Strong presentation skills—you can confidently articulate design rationale to large stakeholder groups. Experience working in collaborative, highly iterative environments, sharing work frequently and refining based on feedback. Proficiency in Figma, Illustrator, Photoshop, and a deep understanding of brand documentation and systematization. A passion for storytelling and the ability to create narratives that drive brand engagement. Comfortable leading workshops, brand exercises, and sprints with both internal and external teams. A deep understanding of product design principles and how brand design integrates with digital experiences. Nice-to-haves: Experience in motion, 3D, or interactive design to enhance brand expression. Strong writing skills—whether it’s creative copy, brand guidelines, or strategic positioning. title: Brand Director
description: We are open to candidates based in EST–GMT time zones. At Metalab, design is at the heart of everything we do. As the Brand Director, you’ll lead with vision, craft, and strategic insight—shaping how brands come to life across digital and experiential touchpoints. Building on Metalab’s legacy of design excellence, you’ll champion the creative direction and strategic development of brand experiences that connect meaningfully with users, drive business impact, and push the boundaries of what brand can mean in the digital era. As a director, you’ll blend thought leadership with hands-on mentorship. You’ll cultivate an environment where teams are inspired to create their best work, ensuring every brand we touch embodies clarity, creativity, and craft. What You’ll Do Lead the Work Define the vision for brand design at Metalab—elevating our brand practice to new levels of creative excellence. Guide and mentor Brand Designers of all levels through all stages of the brand process—from insight to identity to expression. Partner with clients at a strategic level, helping founders and executives articulate, evolve, and scale their brands for digital-first environments. Oversee and refine brand systems that translate seamlessly into product experiences, marketing ecosystems, and motion design. Ensure every brand engagement—internal or client-facing—embodies clarity, consistency, and purpose. Shape Creative Direction Drive the creative process for major brand initiatives, setting the tone for identity systems, storytelling frameworks, and brand guidelines. Collaborate with Product Design leadership to ensure cohesive brand-to-product experiences. Lead cross-disciplinary reviews, elevating critique culture and building team fluency in storytelling, systems thinking, and craft. Push creative boundaries by integrating motion, 3D, and interaction design to create dynamic, immersive brand moments. Champion Collaboration and Growth Partner closely with the Chief Design Officer and Partnerships team in new business pursuits—pitching visionary, brand-led design approaches. Collaborate with Marketing to ensure Metalab’s own brand maintains the highest standard of craft and cohesion across all expressions. Foster team culture rooted in openness, mentorship, and curiosity, ensuring Metalab remains a place where designers grow and thrive. Build bridges across disciplines, connecting brand, product, and marketing to create holistic experiences. Technical & Strategic Competencies Visionary Brand LeadershipYou inspire creative excellence, lead with clarity, and communicate a compelling brand vision that motivates teams and earns client trust. You’re adept at balancing creative risk-taking with strategic rigor—ensuring every brand direction is both aspirational and grounded in business value. Hands on Design Craft You don’t just direct great design; you do it. As one of the most senior contributors in the work, you lead by example with exceptional craft and attention to detail. You’re fluent in modern tools and practices, able to concept, design, and refine at a world-class level. You bring hands-on design energy to pitches, reviews, and live work, ensuring every output reflects the highest creative standards. Brand Systems ExpertiseYou translate complex ideas into coherent, scalable brand systems—visual, verbal, and experiential. You understand how identity lives across environments, from pixels to motion to storytelling, and can direct others to execute at this level. Strategic StorytellingYou see brand as narrative—how story, identity, and experience intersect. You guide teams and clients through this lens, helping them articulate what makes their brand meaningful and distinctive. Cross-Disciplinary CollaborationYou work fluidly across product design, strategy, and marketing, ensuring brand vision permeates all layers of experience. You bring a systems mindset to brand-building, connecting the dots across every touchpoint. Mentorship & CritiqueYou elevate the design community within Metalab by coaching, inspiring, and setting standards for exceptional creative work. You foster a culture of constructive critique and shared learning. Requirements 10+ years of experience in brand design, creative direction, or design leadership—preferably in a digital-first environment. Proven ability to lead multidisciplinary teams and large-scale brand engagements from strategy through execution. A portfolio that demonstrates mastery in visual identity, brand systems, and storytelling across digital touchpoints. Experience presenting to executive stakeholders, with the ability to translate creative thinking into strategic outcomes. Proficiency in modern design tools (Figma, Illustrator, After Effects, etc.) and an understanding of how brands extend through motion, interaction, and content. Strong facilitation and communication skills—you guide workshops and strategic sessions with confidence and empathy. Deep knowledge of design trends, emerging tools, and the evolving role of brand in the digital ecosystem. A passion for mentoring others and shaping the future of design culture at Metalab. title: Brand Designer
description: We are open to remote candidates located within PST to BRT time zones. At Metalab, we design some of the world’s most beloved products. Founders at early-stage startups hire us to help build businesses from scratch, and leaders at global enterprises hire us to help launch new products. As a Brand Designer at Metalab, you will guide the brand design process from start to finish. You will be involved in, and ultimately responsible for all aspects of brand design, delivering stunning, product-ready brands. This is a remote position, so you must be comfortable managing the brand process using remote-friendly methods. We’re looking for designers who love visual identity design and creative strategy and know how to advocate for their work. We’re a product design agency, so you must understand what it takes to get a digital product out the door. If you have a portfolio with examples of your work in the wild, we’d love to talk to you. We’re looking for product-literate people, who know that a great brand is the difference between a good experience and an exceptional one. What you’ll do: Guide the brand design process, from start to finish, owning all aspects of the brand design process. Create inspiring, beautiful, and relevant brands that strengthen our products. Complement and assist the product team, leveling up output by crafting a stunning, product-ready brand. Work closely with Product Designers, Product Managers, Client Partners, and clients to educate and inform them about brand design best practices. Translate your design output into sound, actionable assets and documentation that both internal and external teams can use as a systematized source of truth. Guide our clients through a rigorous yet agile branding process, ensuring they understand what to expect every step of the way. Be accountable for timelines, deliverables, and output with oversight and support from Brand leadership and project teams. Requirements: 5+ years of experience designing products and brands that can be seen in the wild. Proficient with design tools like Figma, Illustrator, and Photoshop. Comfortable working on your own or in a team, communicating directly with stakeholders, and collaborating with Product Designers. Experience in collaborative, highly iterative teams, where open communication and regular sharing of work are integral to the process. You are passionate about storytelling and are effective when communicating concepts to internal and external stakeholders. Confident in leading fundamental brand exercises, workshop activities, and sprint reviews. Presentation both written and in-person is a big part of what we do - you’ll be selling, revising, and presenting ideas directly to large stakeholder groups both internally and externally. You enjoy increasing other people’s design literacy. You are adaptable and enjoy evolving how you work to ensure productive weekly sprints. You actively participate in feedback sessions and look forward to iterating on concepts. Nice-to-haves: Writing is a key part of our process, so we’re looking for candidates who are comfortable writing and editing both strategic and creative copy. Motion or 3D skills are a huge plus. Product design knowledge (systems, best practices, and ways of working) is an asset. title: Design Lead
description: We are open to candidates based in the Americas. We believe magic happens when thoughtful collaboration and unparalleled expertise come together to turn great ideas into great products. Design Leads at Metalab play a direct role in that magic. They steer projects in the right direction by leading the day-to-day work internally and managing clients' expectations, while also getting into the files themselves. It’s about high-quality output and outcomes. As a Design Lead, you’ll have a vested interest in helping other designers find their groove. Given that our primary focus is product design, a deep understanding of what it takes to get digital products out the door is our first non-negotiable. Beyond that, you’ve established yourself as someone people look up to, and you don’t take that privilege lightly. You’ll still deal in pixels, but you’ll also play an integral role in a project’s success with clear direction, leadership, guidance, and encouragement. You believe that good ideas can come from anywhere, and you actively support your team in making sure everyone is heard. What you’ll do Guide the design process throughout the entire project lifecycle Drive client presentations and discussions of your team’s work Respectfully decline the status quo and push both clients and colleagues outside their comfort zones Foster positive client relationships and directly influence client stakeholders Work with Product Managers and Client Partners to scope project requirements Help promote an inspiring and inclusive environment for the team Coach and mentor Product Designers to determine and work towards desired career growth paths, sharing tailored feedback and guidance, and monitoring overall fulfillment and happiness Work hand-in-hand with engineers and product team members to foster innovation and ensure feasibility and fidelity of implementation Promote a culture title: Principal Product Designer
description: We are open to remote candidates. Metalab creates products loved by billions around the world, shaping how we work, live, and play. You've likely interacted with many of the products we've helped bring to life. Now, we need your expertise to craft the future.As a Principal Product Designer, you’ll lead fully within the work, constantly seeking opportunities to elevate design quality and expand the skillsets of those around you. Joining a team of the most senior design practitioners at Metalab, you’ll be expected to operate across multiple creative disciplines, delivering exceptional work on the most challenging projects. Often, you’ll lead in defining the product experience, translating the intention of the product strategy and the character and emotion of the brand into thoughtful, useful, and lovable products. What you’ll do You'll work across many aspects of the design process. Our Principals are true multidisciplinary designers and craftspeople, bridging experience, visual, and motion design to create exceptional digital products. Set the bar for quality on your projects. Typically you’ll be the only principal designer on a project, so you’ll be identifying opportunities to elevate the work and the team around you, often pushing clients and colleagues outside of their comfort zones to deliver exceptional products. Support other designers of all levels in the work and help to promote an inspiring and inclusive environment for the team. Work closely with our brand team to ensure that the brand principles are translated into the products we design. Collaborate with design specialists. Participate with research and strategy to generate and evaluate design opportunities, and test solutions through storyboards and prototypes. Collaborate directly with and present to key client team members. Work hand-in-hand with engineers and product team members to foster innovation and ensure feasibility and fidelity of implementation. If desired, you have the opportunity to coach and mentor other designers. Share your knowledge and approach to the craft with the broader design team at Metalab and the wider industry. Requirements Experience working in collaborative, highly iterative, cross-functional teams, sharing work daily. Proven experience across UX, UI, and Motion design at a senior level, with a portfolio that showcases your range, typically T-shaped with your core discipline being UI and Motion design. Strong facilitation and communication skills, enabling effective critique and design discussions, with a demonstrated ability to communicate design rationale and strategy effectively. A track record of working across the product development cycle, from initial vision and discovery through to detailed design execution. Metalab creates products loved by billions around the world, shaping how we work, live, and play. You've likely interacted with many of the products we've helped bring to life. Now, we're looking for a Senior Product Designer to help us craft the future. As a Senior Product Designer, you'll bring a refined ability to balance form and function, while navigating the needs of both clients and users. You're not just a designer; you're a strategic thinker and a collaborator at heart. We’re an end-to-end digital product studio, so you'll apply your design expertise across every phase of the process—from research to wireframes to visual design. We’re looking for someone who thrives in dynamic, evolving environments and is truly passionate about design and product. Apply your design thinking and execution skills throughout the entire product lifecycle, keeping a keen eye on opportunities to step in and step up. Help shape the visual identity of products, whether that’s translating an existing brand or creating a visual identity from scratch. Participate in design team reviews, sharing, and brainstorms. Requirements 5+ years of product design experience at a digital product agency or consultancy. A portfolio that reflects your strengths in both UX and visual design skills. title: Senior Product Designer & Researcher
description: Back to jobsSenior Product Designer & Researcher Remote About the Team: Our growing User Experience (UX) team is looking for a Senior Product Designer & Researcher generalist to help evolve the developer experience on Netlify in collaboration with a diverse group of cross-functional partners in engineering, developer education, product management, support, marketing, and sales. As a critical member of our UX Team, you’ll keep our users at the center of your process and balance near- and long-term initiatives that drive us toward building a better web. With our team, you’ll share and collaborate early and often, driving and facilitating meaningful discussion with a blend of in-person and async transparent communication. You’ll lead initiatives ranging from iterative feature improvements to explorations with high ambiguity that demand innovation. There’s plenty to do, so be ready to roll up your sleeves to help shape our team and raise the quality of developer and team experiences. What You’ll Do: Use your prior experience to lead projects toward user and business solutions and drive the design work and team from research to full-realized features and flows. Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, and other partners to represent the UX team, build bridges, facilitate design or research kickoffs and discussions, and drive the user experience forward. Contribute to our design system and processes, including accessibility practices Support your team with thoughtful feedback and shape how we tell customer experience stories at Netlify. Manage participant recruiting, participant followups, and incentives disbursement for all studies Effectively communicate findings and recommendations to product teams and stakeholders that surface recommendations and implications Work with product stakeholders to test business requirements using heuristic/qualitative methods, in a rapid way Establish strong async communication rhythms with your peers and leaders, practicing transparency and visibility in your progress against areas of focus. Contribute to our expanding research practice and run usability tests in collaboration with research partners. Organize around multiple work streams, including prioritizing, iterating, and timeboxing work as needed. Create structure where there is ambiguity, can quickly adapt to organizational change and workstream shifts, and can help others navigate staffing and priority changes. What You'll Bring: A history of leading design efforts at a strategic level for technical products, platforms, or systems. Proficiency at iterating & circulating concepts with peers and building toward high-confidence proposals, effectively prototyping and storytelling at various fidelities throughout the process. A breadth of experience in the iterative product development process, from problem definition, information architecture, and UX flows to interaction and UI design. A high level of comfort in working with developers in the presentation layer (for example, HTML, CSS) and is well-versed in using tools such as Figma and GitHub. Rigor for accessibility, consistency, and high standard of quality. Consistent autonomy and a drive to thrive in a cross-disciplinary and collaborative environment with product and engineering teams, where colleagues teach and learn from one another.Growth mindset: curious and open to new technologies, methodologies, and best practices. Experience in research operations including managing a participant database and setting up studies Ownership in scoping, planning, and executing usability research studies, with minimal support and guidance Welcome, but not required: other experience such as iconography, branding, front-end engineering, or content design. We don’t have educational requirements for roles at Netlify, so whether you went to a school or are self-taught, we encourage you to apply. We welcome candidates based in the US and Canada for this position. Applying Not sure you meet 100% of our qualifications? Please apply anyway! When applying please include: A resume or short listing of your job history & skills (link to a LinkedIn profile would be fine). We appreciate a cover letter explaining why you would enjoy working in this role at Netlify to get to know you a bit better, though this is not required and will not impact your application. Our mission is to “build a better web” and that cannot be done without a diversity of skill sets, backgrounds and thoughts. Of everything we've ever built at Netlify, we are most proud of our team. Netlify is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are devoted to building a team of people with diverse backgrounds and lifestyles. Driving equality empowers our team, enables us to innovate, and helps us maintain a more inclusive environment. We don’t discriminate against employees or applicants based on gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, age, race, military/veteran status, citizenship, pregnancy status, or any other differences. If we can do anything to provide a better interview, i.e. accommodate a disability, then please let us know by emailing accommodations@netlify.com. About Netlify Netlify is the most popular way to build, deploy, and scale modern web applications, empowering everyone from fast moving solo developers to enterprise teams. Millions of developers and organizations rely on Netlify as their platform of choice for composing web applications that are production ready, performant, and flexible. Now, as we embrace the next era of software development, we are embedding the same fluid, intuitive experience into the Agent Experience (AX), making it just as simple for intelligent agents to understand, interact with, and act on our platform as it is for developers. Whether your user is human or machine, Netlify ensures the path from idea to URL is seamless, fast, and deeply reliable. We are a Series D company that has raised over $200M from investors such as Andreessen Horowitz, Kleiner Perkins, EQT, Bessemer, BOND, and Menlo Ventures. As a fully distributed company, we aim to create a company culture where the best idea can come from anywhere and strive to be thoughtful, compassionate, and collaborative in our work. If this sounds like something you’d like to be part of, we’re excited to connect with you! At Netlify, we are committed to a compensation philosophy that prioritizes fairness and equity, positions our employee compensation competitively in the market, recognizes and rewards performance, and takes a comprehensive approach to our rewards package. We anchor our compensation philosophy on a market-based approach, therefore salary ranges may differ depending on the labor cost in a particular location. The salary provided is in addition to robust benefits and participation in Netlify’s equity plan. Our hiring range for this role is targeted at $157,000 - $212,000 CAD for Senior and $208,000 - $240,000 CAD for Staff in most Canada-based locations. Candidates outside Canada or in premium markets should consult with their Talent Acquisition partner regarding location-based ranges, as they may be higher or lower than the average range listed. The starting pay will be determined based on multiple factors, including expertise and skills, market demands, experience, internal equity, and applicable geographic location. These compensation packages and ranges are subject to change and may be modified in the future.

description: Careers Opportunities by Department Colleagues at The Times contribute to our mission of seeking the truth and helping people understand the world. Our newsroom comprises both experienced colleagues and those just beginning their careers, including reporters and editors, coders, visual and graphic artists, sound engineers and audience experts from countries around the world. In a newsroom ceremony at The Times, senior leaders and journalists celebrated an incredible year of journalism and spoke about the 2025 Pulitzer Prize winners. Earl Wilson/The New York Times Learn more about The Newsroom and Times Opinion Roles Product Design Based on a clear product strategy and vision, our Product Design team is the momentum driving the design, building and maintenance of our mobile applications, website, newsletter templates and more. The multimedia experiences and tools created by the team help our readers save, follow and interact with our journalism across platforms. Caleb Bryant Miller for The New York Times Explore Open Roles Product Engineering There’s never been a more exciting time to work in technology at The Times. Our team of technologists supports our mission by providing a best-in-class digital experience to the millions of people who engage with our products daily. From News to Audio, Cooking, Wirecutter and Games, our talented technology colleagues create a distinctive and seamless experience across all our products. Explore Open Roles Corporate Colleagues on the business side help enable our journalism and drive the organization toward achieving the goal of increasing subscribers. Their efforts help steer us toward becoming the essential subscription by positioning the company as the best news destination in the world and engaging people’s passions throughout all of our product experiences. ©Nic Lehoux Explore Open Roles Explore More About Us The Newsroom and Times Opinion History Press Room

title: We design delightful UX to boost your business growth
description: UI/UX DesignBy putting your users and their experience first, we help you achieve your business goals. From upgrading existing products to building new applications, we design digital experiences that captivate your users.DiscoverUX ResearchOur proven UX Research process establishes an evidence-based foundation to identify the real needs of your users. With qualitative and quantitative research, we derive revealing insights to maximize your product value.DiscoverAdditional servicesWe understand that business demands are vast, so we offer additional services that address your design goals.Design ThinkingWe adopt a user-centered approach that involves understanding the user, generating ideas, and rapidly validating those ideas to create solutions that address user needs.No-code DevelopmentWe design websites and build applications using no-code tools to reduce development time and enable your team to iterate quickly.Design SystemsWe build scalable design systems to ensure consistency and efficiency in your design process, creating a cohesive brand identity and experience across all your digital touchpoints.Content StrategyWe create effective strategies to deliver on-brand, engaging and impactful content that strikes a chord with your audience.Our designs yield the best resultsView WorkView case studyUX Research, UI/UX Design, Wordpress DevelopmentBoosted website traffic by 300%Request case studyUX Research, UI/UX Design, Wordpress DevelopmentBoosted website traffic by 300%View case studyUX Research, UI/UX DesignHelped communicate brand upgrade globallyRequest case studyUX Research, UI/UX DesignHelped communicate brand upgrade globallyView case studyUI/UX Design, Web & Mobile DevelopmentEngaged 15M+ users since launchRequest case studyUI/UX Design, Web & Mobile DevelopmentEngaged 15M+ users since launchView case studyUI/UX Design, Web & Mobile DevelopmentSupported 20M+ player accounts globallyRequest case studyUI/UX Design, Web & Mobile DevelopmentSupported 20M+ player accounts globallyWe work across many industriesExplore the industries where we have developed digital products to address unique business needs. FinanceOur team possesses extensive experience in designing and developing financial services products, from financial terminals to investment portals. We create solutions that cater to the needs of financial professionals and their clients. Real EstateWe excel at building cutting-edge real estate platforms with our in-depth understanding of geolocation, maps, cap rates, and REITs. Our solutions offer users seamless, intuitive experiences for property discovery, buying, and selling. MediaWe have honed our expertise in crafting captivating experiences for media clients, from news distributors to fashion magazines. Our team understands how to engage and retain audiences in the ever-evolving media landscape. HospitalityOur track record includes working with leading health-food chains, luxury restaurants, and boutique hotels to build seamless experiences for their customers. Our solutions help businesses streamline their operations, improve customer satisfaction, and drive revenue growth. SportsWorking with leading sports brands and fast-growing startups, we have developed innovative digital experiences that captivate fans and generate revenue. Our solutions deliver seamless, immersive experiences for users interacting with sports content. EducationWe partner with businesses to build engaging eLearning experiences that help educate people across the globe. Our solutions deliver captivating content, foster collaboration and community, and drive measurable learning outcomes. HealthcareWe have worked with various healthcare organizations to build HIPAA-compliant products. Our deep understanding of healthcare regulations and standards allows us to create solutions tailored to the unique needs of healthcare organizations. Non-ProfitThrough our very own Perpetual Fund, we are dedicated to making a positive global impact. We collaborate with non-profit organizations to develop impactful solutions that empower them to fulfill their missions and make a difference in the world.Design and UX FAQsWhat is the difference between UI and UX design? UI design focuses on the visual elements of an interface, such as colors, typography, and layout. UX design, on the other hand, focuses on the overall experience of using an interface, including factors such as usability, accessibility, and user satisfaction. At Perpetual, we recognize the importance of both UI and UX design in creating effective and engaging digital experiences that meet the needs of both users and businesses.How can UX design help my business? UX design can help your business by creating user-friendly interfaces that improve user satisfaction and engagement. It can also help you increase customer acquisition and conversion, reduce support costs, and improve customer retention. We follow a user-centered approach to create intuitive and effective designs that exceed user expectations and drive business success.What is design thinking? Cross-platform design is an essential part of modern interface design. It involves creating interfaces that work seamlessly across a wide range of devices and platforms. This means that regardless of whether your users are on desktops, tablets, or mobile devices, they will be able to use your app or website without any issues. To achieve this, designers use responsive design principles, which ensure that the interface adapts to the screen size and resolution of the device it's being viewed on. Beyond this, the design must also take into account user needs and behaviors. This means understanding how users interact with different devices and platforms, as well as what they expect from the interface. By doing so, designers can create cohesive and user-friendly interfaces that provide a seamless experience across all devices and platforms.How does UX research benefit my business? UX research can benefit your business by helping you understand your users and their needs. This can lead to the creation of more effective and user-friendly designs, which can improve customer satisfaction, engagement, and loyalty. We conduct in-depth UX research to inform design decisions and ensure that our solutions meet the needs and preferences of your target audience.Do I need a design system? A design system is a collection of reusable design elements and guidelines that ensure consistency and efficiency in the design process. Whether or not you need a design system depends on the complexity of your product and the size of your design team. If you're building a large product or have a team of designers working on different parts of the product, a design system can help ensure consistency and reduce design debt. It can also help you create a cohesive brand identity and streamline your design process. Our team can help you evaluate the need for a design system and, if necessary, develop a custom design system tailored to your product and brand.Why is content strategy important for my business? Content strategy is important for your business because it helps you create effective and engaging content that supports your business objectives. It can help you attract and retain customers, improve brand recognition, and increase conversions. We work with you to create content strategies that align with your business’ brand voice and messaging.How can UX design ensure compliance with accessibility regulations? UX design can ensure compliance with accessibility regulations by following established accessibility guidelines, conducting user testing with people with disabilities, and using assistive technologies to test and validate designs. This can reduce the risk of legal action and improve customer satisfaction and engagement. We have extensive experience in creating accessible designs that meet compliance standards and ensure a seamless experience for all users.Should I redesign my website? A website redesign can help you improve user engagement and satisfaction by creating a more intuitive and user-friendly design. It can also improve search engine optimization (SEO) and increase website traffic. A website redesign can also help you stay up to date with the latest design trends and technologies and ensure that your website reflects your brand identity and business goals. We work with businesses to create website redesigns that deliver measurable business outcomes and improve user experience.How does cross-platform design work? Cross-platform design is an essential part of modern interface design. It involves creating interfaces that work seamlessly across a wide range of devices and platforms. This means that regardless of whether your users are on desktops, tablets, or mobile devices, they will be able to use your app or website without any issues. To achieve this, designers use responsive design principles, which ensure that the interface adapts to the screen size and resolution of the device it's being viewed on. Beyond this, the design must also take into account user needs and behaviors. This means understanding how users interact with different devices and platforms, as well as what they expect from the interface. By doing so, designers can create cohesive and user-friendly interfaces that provide a seamless experience across all devices and platforms.What is competitor analysis in UX design? Competitor analysis is a crucial process in UX design that involves researching and analyzing the products and services of your competitors. This involves studying their designs, identifying their strengths and weaknesses, and understanding the unique selling points of each competitor. By gaining a deep understanding of the competitive landscape, we can create designs that differentiate your brand and meet the needs of your users. This process provides valuable insights into what works and what doesn't work in the industry, allowing you to make informed decisions about your own design strategy. Additionally, competitor analysis can help you identify gaps in the market and areas where your brand can stand out from the competition. By leveraging these insights, we can create user experiences that are unique, innovative, and effective.What is a UX design audit? A UX design audit is an important process that can help you understand the strengths and weaknesses of your existing product's design, usability, and overall user experience. This process involves a thorough review of your product's visual design, interaction design, and information architecture. By identifying areas for improvement and providing recommendations, we can help you optimize your product for user engagement, retention, and business success.What is Usability Testing? Usability testing is a method for evaluating the effectiveness and ease of use of a product, service, or system. By testing with representative users, usability testing helps identify any usability problems or issues with the product and gathers feedback that can be used to improve the user experience. During a usability test, participants are given a set of tasks to complete using the product or system, while researchers observe and take notes on their behavior and feedback. This can be done in a lab or remotely, and can involve various methods, such as product walkthroughs, interviews, and usability metrics.What is a Wireframe? A wireframe is a simple sketch or outline of a website or app design that shows the basic layout and structure of a page. It's like a blueprint for a building, showing where everything will go without any fancy details or colors. We use wireframes to plan out the overall layout of a user interface and to make sure it's easy to use before investing too much time and effort into the details. Wireframes can be created with simple tools like pen and paper, or with tools like Figma. By using wireframes, designers can create user interfaces that are organized, easy to understand, and enjoyable to use.What is the composition of a typical design team? A typical design team may include a UX designer and a UX researcher. The UX designer is responsible for creating intuitive and user-friendly interfaces that meet the needs of users. The UX researcher conducts user research to identify user needs and preferences and works closely with the designer to ensure that the final product is tailored to the user's needs. Depending on the project scope and requirements, the team may also include project managers and developers. By working collaboratively, the team can ensure that the final product not only meets user needs but also aligns with the business objectives of the project. This collaborative approach helps to ensure that the product is well-designed, user-friendly, and meets the needs of both users and the business.

title: Associate Manager, Brand Marketing
description: Back to jobsNewAssociate Manager, Brand MarketingBengaluru Razorpay is one of India’s leading full-stack financial technology companies, powering the way businesses move, manage, and grow money. Founded in 2014 by Harshil Mathur and Shashank Kumar with a simple vision — to simplify payments for Indian businesses — we’ve since grown into a fintech powerhouse driving India’s digital payment revolution. Razorpay powers millions of businesses with a smarter, scalable stack that goes beyond transactions to help them truly build and grow. From seamless checkouts to payroll automation, across India, Singapore, and Malaysia, we’ve been engineering a fintech ecosystem that’s redefining how money moves across Asia — and we’re just getting started. Today, that ecosystem supports everyone from early-stage startups to some of India’s largest enterprises, enabling them to accept, process, and disburse payments at scale while expanding into new ways of managing money more efficiently. Our scale speaks volumes: Razorpay processes $180+ billion in annualized transactions, powering leading businesses like Airbnb, Facebook, WhatsApp, Airtel, CRED, BookmyShow, Zomato, Swiggy, Lenskart, Mirae Asset Capital markets, Indian Oil, National Pension Scheme — and over 100 of India’s unicorns. With strong roots in India and growing operations in Southeast Asia, we are shaping the next chapter of financial technology across the region. We are backed by global investors including GIC, Peak XV Partners (formerly Sequoia Capital India & SEA), Tiger Global, Ribbit Capital, Matrix Partners, MasterCard, and Salesforce Ventures, having raised over $740 million to date. Strategic acquisitions — including Ezetap (POS and offline payments), Curlec (Malaysia expansion), BillMe (digital invoicing), and POP (rewards-first UPI) — along with earlier moves in fraud prevention, payroll, and lending, have further strengthened our platform and widened our footprint across Asia. But what truly sets Razorpay apart is our culture. At Razorpay, ownership is our oxygen — you own what you build, with no micromanagement or red tape, just the runway to make your ideas fly. Learning is a lifestyle — if you’re curious, you’ll feel at home here. People > Pedigree — we hire for attitude, hustle, and hunger more than degrees. Transparency thrives over titles — this is where interns question CXOs and CXOs say “thank you.” Guided by our values of Customer First, Autonomy & Ownership, Agility with Integrity, Transparency, Challenging the status quo and a strong belief that Razorpay grows with Razors, you’ll be part of a 3000+ strong team building not just products, but the financial infrastructure of the future.About the Role We are looking for a Marketing Manager to own customer-facing marketing programs that drive adoption, engagement, and growth.This role will partner closely with the Growth, Product and Digital Marketing teams to translate business goals into scalable marketing initiatives across value proposition, customer journeys, and growth programs.We are looking for someone who finds creative, insight-led ways to influence customer behaviour and grow the business. Key Responsibilities Own integrated GTM plans for product launches, feature releases, and growth initiatives Define target audiences, messaging frameworks, channel strategy, and success metrics Continuously improve funnel performance through brand-led messaging, testing, and experience enhancements Use insights to scale high-performing initiatives and sunset low-impact efforts Design and execute marketing-led growth programs including gamification, milestone mechanics, loyalty initiatives, and adoption journeys Build scalable customer experiences that drive repeat usage and movement into higher-value cohorts Basic Qualifications 2-6 years of hands-on experience across core marketing functions, including GTM and customer growth initiatives Experience leading GTM programs and cross-functional initiatives Strong analytical skills with experience using data to drive marketing decisions Proven ability to manage cross-functional projects end-to-end across multiple stakeholders Excellent written and verbal communication skills Preferred Qualifications MBA from a top tier university Experience in ecommerce, fintech, SaaS, or high-growth consumer technology companies Razorpay believes in and follows an equal employment opportunity policy that doesn't discriminate on gender, religion, sexual orientation, colour, nationality, age, etc. We welcome interests and applications from all groups and communities across the globe. Follow us on LinkedIn & Twitter

description: Back to jobsProduct Designer IIBengaluru Razorpay is one of India’s leading full-stack financial technology companies, powering the way businesses move, manage, and grow money. Today, that ecosystem supports everyone from early-stage startups to some of India’s largest enterprises, enabling them to accept, process, and disburse payments at scale while expanding into new ways of managing money more efficiently. Our scale speaks volumes: Razorpay processes $180+ billion in annualized transactions, powering leading businesses like Airbnb, Facebook, WhatsApp, Airtel, CRED, BookmyShow, Zomato, Swiggy, Lenskart, Mirae Asset Capital markets, Indian Oil, National Pension Scheme — and over 100 of India’s unicorns. With strong roots in India and growing operations in Southeast Asia, we are shaping the next chapter of financial technology across the region. We are backed by global investors including GIC, Peak XV Partners (formerly Sequoia Capital India & SEA), Tiger Global, Ribbit Capital, Matrix Partners, MasterCard, and Salesforce Ventures, having raised over $740 million to date. Strategic acquisitions — including Ezetap (POS and offline payments), Curlec (Malaysia expansion), BillMe (digital invoicing), and POP (rewards-first UPI) — along with earlier moves in fraud prevention, payroll, and lending, have further strengthened our platform and widened our footprint across Asia. But what truly sets Razorpay apart is our culture. At Razorpay, ownership is our oxygen — you own what you build, with no micromanagement or red tape, just the runway to make your ideas fly. Learning is a lifestyle — if you’re curious, you’ll feel at home here. People > Pedigree — we hire for attitude, hustle, and hunger more than degrees. Transparency thrives over titles — this is where interns question CXOs and CXOs say “thank you.” Guided by our values of Customer First, Autonomy & Ownership, Agility with Integrity, Transparency, Challenging the status quo and a strong belief that Razorpay grows with Razors, you’ll be part of a 3000+ strong team building not just products, but the financial infrastructure of the future. The Role: You are someone who believes that good design has a role in the solution to every problem. You know that design is not just how things look and feel, but also how every process evolves. Even mundane processes from daily life can be made easier with design. You love products and have great creative skills. You want to own and be responsible for designing and driving products to completion. You religiously follow Buxton’s rule of producing at least 3 alternatives for every design decision. You respect the grid and hate all the half pixel aligned icons. Roles and Responsibilities : As a Product Designer you will: Take part in product and design ideation, planning and prioritization of our diverse range of products and features. Drive user research, create detailed user journeys and take appropriate design decisions backed by user-behavior and data. Define design strategies by analyzing data models and derive best practices within the team. Work closely with cross-disciplinary teams including Product, Engineering, Marketing and various Business teams to deliver delightful customer experiences. Strategize, develop, and extend the visual design systems and pattern libraries by coming up with new and innovative solutions which suit the Razorpay brand. Take part in creative and holistic thinking across our diverse products and conduct design reviews and status meetings as needed. Evangelize design within and outside the organization. Brainstorm and create new directions that Razorpay can take in our quest to make payments easy and accessible to all. Effectively mentor and inspire a team of designers. Help the team in raising the bar, resolving blockers, prioritizing and breaking down complex projects into simpler tasks. Mandatory Qualifications: As a Product Designer II, we expect you to have : 2+ years of experience in designing digital products. Ability to understand short and long-term goals of the product and business. Keen in applying user research, user-needs validation and usability evaluation. Excellent understanding of user-centered design and visual design principles. You understand the importance of behavioral analytics and you go by data-driven decisioning, when needed. A good understanding of Frontend principles to guide the team from an engineering point of view. Excellent communication and presentation skills and the ability to clearly articulate design decisions to the team and leadership. Razorpay believes in and follows an equal employment opportunity policy that doesn't discriminate on gender, religion, sexual orientation, colour, nationality, age, etc. We welcome interests and applications from all groups and communities across the globe. Follow us on LinkedIn & Twitter

title: AI Creative Director
description:
About Red Antler

We were founded on the wild idea that startups should care about their brand — and it’s that eyes-wide, sparks-fly thinking that still defines who we are today. We launch businesses that are changing the world and transform global brands looking to future proof their success. We start with a big idea and then make all kinds of wonderful things that people will obsess over.

We are seeking an AI Creative Director to co-lead our innovation lab with a focused mandate for rapid ideation and experimentation. We are looking for someone with an entrepreneurial spirit, a drive to stay ahead of what’s next, and a genuine enthusiasm for shaping the future of brands through technology.

Who You Are

A visionary creative leader with a deep expertise in AI, emerging technology, and brand transformation. An innovator in process and format, you embrace technology as part of your work and are always finding ways to spark inspiration and break formulas in ways that push world-building. You are an AI connoisseur who likes to test and use AI tools firsthand but also maintain a discerning understanding that technology should be applied purposefully and not purely for novelty. Your work sits at the intersection of creativity and innovation and you are able to confidently set a vision for both internal teams and clients alike as well as get deeply practical when it comes down to being able to execute and deliver. You are skilled in partnering with executive leadership to deliver ideas that shape culture, drives business growth, and builds enduring reputations.

What You’ll Do

You will have two core focuses: leading a small cross-functional team developing an AI-powered approach to creating leading work. In addition, developing breakthrough AI solutions for our portfolio of clients.

AI-Led Lab:
You will help lead an experimental AI-focused team, alongside a Creative Technologist, with a goal to innovate and break existing agency paradigms and processes. This RA Lab will sit within the main Red Antler organization but work outside existing structures, with a goal to be able to develop new approaches to creating work and building tools and workflows to support delivery.

Visionary Practitioner:
This role relies on someone being part of the making, not just the managing. Being embedded in the creative process, well versed in prompt engineering and prototyping. You will be in hands-on with experimentation, actively shaping concepts from spark to execution, and inspiring the team by showing what’s possible through your own creative craft.

AI Translation & Value Creation:
Translate emerging AI capabilities into tangible, value-driving opportunities for clients—bridging the gap between hype and practical deployment.

Collaborative AI Development:
Collaborate with strategists, creative technologists, and developers to design bespoke AI applications for marketing, branding, and storytelling use cases.

Workshop Facilitation & Innovation Sprints:
Lead internal workshops and innovation sprints to identify opportunities for AI adoption and generate future-forward creative strategies.

Mentorship & Team Development:
Foster a culture of creative ambition, experimentation, and continuous learning. Mentor creative teams to harness the power of AI and technology while nurturing originality and craft.

What You Bring

  • Experience in branding, digital, tech-driven creative environments and prompt engineering.

  • Proven track record in AI-driven campaigns and technology-first creative leadership.

  • Ability to inspire, lead, and develop high-performing, diverse creative teams on a global scale.

  • Reputation for work that is both innovative and impactful.

What We Offer

  • The opportunity to shape the creative vision at the forefront of AI and technology.

  • Resources and autonomy to build and mentor an industry-leading team, fostering the next generation of creative and AI talent.

  • Work with a diverse portfolio of world-class brands and partners.

  • An environment where innovation, experimentation, and creativity are core values.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Want to do work that actually means something? At Fat Earth Media, we’re all about helping brands with purpose make a real impact. We’re done with office politics and half-hearted efforts—our team shows up every day with energy and a drive to do great things. We’re a fast-growing performance marketing agency, and we believe that a positive vibe and all-in attitude are the way to go.

We’re on the hunt for a talented Graphic Designer to join us, focusing on ads for platforms like Meta and designing emails in Figma. You’ll be creating eye-catching, effective campaigns for all sorts of clients, from scrappy startups to big-name brands. We need someone who’s got a sharp eye for detail, knows design inside and out (especially motion), and loves coming up with fresh ideas. If you’ve worked in an agency before, that’s a bonus—you’ll be teaming up with different groups to juggle multiple projects and deliver top-notch designs that clients love.

Sound like you? Let’s make something awesome together.

What You’ll Do

  • Dream Up Cool Stuff: Design ads and emails that look awesome and feel true to each brand, no matter the industry.
  • Team Up: Work with our creative crew and email strategists to nail client goals and turn ideas into designs that hit hard.
  • Stay Fresh: Keep an eye on what’s trending in design to keep our work sharp and cutting-edge.
  • Blend Words & Visuals: Partner with copywriters to make sure text and visuals vibe perfectly in ad campaigns.
  • Make Things Move: Use After Effects to create ads with slick motion design—bonus points if you’re comfy with expressions, because we love those.
  • Figma Wizardry: Build clean, effective email designs in Figma.
  • Check Your Work: Give your designs a final look to make sure they’re ready before they go to internal review.
  • Set the Tone: Work with your manager to shape the creative direction for clients, whether they’re a startup finding their way or a big brand with a clear vision.

What You Bring

  • 2+ years as a graphic designer, with a portfolio that shows off your ad and email game.
  • Killer skills in Adobe Creative Suite, especially After Effects and Photoshop.
  • Figma know-how for crafting email designs.
  • A solid grip on design basics—typography, color theory, the works.
  • Great at communicating and collaborating, thriving in a fast-moving, deadline-driven setup.
  • Ability to juggle multiple clients and nail their unique brand vibes in your designs.
  • Agency experience? That’s a plus.

What’s in It for You

  • Pay: $70,000–$80,000 a year.
  • Healthcare coverage.
  • 401k plan.
  • Unlimited PTO to recharge when you need it.

Who We Are

Fat Earth Media is a performance marketing agency obsessed with helping direct-to-consumer brands grow. We love working with startups, partnering closely with founders to make their vision real—whether they’re grinding for ROAS on a bootstrap budget or chasing big sales with VC backing. We keep it real, care about our clients and team, and believe success comes from working together, not proving who’s right.

We’re looking for top-tier talent who’s stoked to help grow amazing brands while growing with us. Ready to join the crew?

title: Senior Brand Designer
description: At Red Antler, we launch and grow brands. From startups seeking to bring new ideas to life to established companies aiming to retain their category leadership, we help businesses tell the story of why they matter to put them at the center of every tomorrow. We’re searching for an imaginative, dedicated Senior Designer to join our Creative team. Storytelling is at the center of everything that we do. We collaborate across disciplines to create and develop dynamic brand worlds for our clients. From logos to content to color, our work needs to work for where it shows up for our clients, and we’re constantly pushing the boundaries of what it is to be a brand. Our Senior Designers are conceptual thinkers who like exploring, experimenting, trying new things, failing, and trying again. They’re plugged into brands today, and what’s new and interesting in the world in general. Brand designers work collaboratively across teams as we develop a range of brand worlds for our clients that span many touchpoints and industries. About you: You have 4–6 years of graphic design experience in a creative or branding agency. Whatever your background, you are dedicated to improving your craft and understanding of design and brand building.You are a multidisciplinary designer with motion design work in your portfolio. You are a visual communicator. There are concepts and thinking behind your work. You will explore how brands are built from the ground up, help conceive and develop compelling brand worlds rooted in strategy, and answer our clients’ business needs.You like working in a team environment and are excited to partner with your colleagues to create brands for our clients. You are curious to learn more about other creative disciplines and will collaborate across strategy, digital, and advertising to create memorable brand worlds for clients.You are able to add something new into any discussion, whatever your background. From brainstorming and initial concepting through final production, you’ll work closely with Design Leads, Design Directors, and Creative Directors to push design work forward. You will handle everything from sketching and visualizing to refining final assets for delivery to clients.You are plugged into brands today and what’s new and interesting in the world in general, and have a desire to explore, experiment, try new things, fail sometimes, and try again. You’re proactive and enjoy creative problem-solving—you can manage your time and meet deadlines, and no design challenge is too big or small. You are proficient at the standard design programs, but eager to learn new ones e.g. digital, animating, 3D etc. You also have a proficient understanding of type, layouts, and use of color with excellent typography and drawing skills.You embrace technology as part of your work—AI, motion, and beyond. You are always finding ways to spark inspiration and break formulas in ways that push world-building.

title: Creative Team (Art Director & Copywriter) Sao Paulo
description: Creative Team (Art Director & Copywriter) Sao PauloSHAREXLINKEDINEMAILCreative Team - Art Director & Copywriter About R/GA R/GA is a global digital innovation agency specializing in digital product development, brand transformation, media, and communications for major companies. We are on a mission to help companies grow by enabling them to change—across their business, the experience they offer, and the campaigns that take them to market. Our work blends what we call Stories and Systems: narrative and design, technology and interface working together. R/GA is a brand, but also a collective of atypical outsiders and misfits who drive everything we do through bold creativity and bright, strategic thinking. About the Role R/GA is searching for a creative team - Art Director & Copywriter - who together deliver world-class ideas that push the boundaries of creativity. You’re fluent in concepting as a team and collaborating with others. You know how to turn insights into powerful ideas and bring them to life through impeccable craft, whether in words, visuals, or integrated experiences. You’re big on big ideas, comfortable selling them to clients. You're endlessly curious, inventive, and at ease working across formats, channels, and technologies. Our creative teams think broadly—about culture, behavior, platforms, and emerging tech. They craft brand stories and systems, and connect people with brands through work that’s original, unexpected, strategic, and always on brand. On any given day you might - Concept and collaborate as a team (AD + CW) and with other creatives including designers, strategists, creative directors, technologists, and project managers.. - Develop campaign platforms and translate them into integrated executions across channels—film, social, digital ecosystems, product experiences, activations, content, and more. - Craft world-class copy (CW) and world-class visual expressions (AD): from headlines and scripts to design systems, art direction, and layouts. - Explore and apply new technologies, from AI tools to emerging platforms, in the service of idea development and execution. - Work closely with creative leadership from the NY office to ensure concepts are on brand and strategically grounded. - Partner with project managers to ensure deliverables are on time, on budget, and aligned with client expectations. - Present ideas to clients at all levels with clarity, conviction, and a strong creative point of view. - Guide and mentor junior talent, fostering a collaborative and high-performing creative culture. The Ideal Team - A portfolio demonstrating conceptual strength and the ability to produce innovative, award-winning work across channels. - Work that shows outstanding craft—writing craft (CW) and design/visual craft (AD). - Curiosity, passion for digital media, and an interest in emerging tech such as AI, platform innovation, and new creative tools. - The ability to juggle multiple projects and maintain quality under pressure. - Strong collaboration and communication skills—able to accept feedback, iterate, and elevate ideas together. - A desire to build brands, solve business problems creatively, and produce work that earns attention and results. - Marketing sense and an understanding of how campaign platforms work across systems and touchpoints. You Bring - A portfolio showcasing stories + systems thinking and strong idea-to-execution capabilities. - 3 to 6 years of experience working at world-class agencies and/or on global brands. - Ability to collaborate seamlessly across departments (strategy, tech, PM, production, media). - Fluency with writing tools (CW) and design/execution platforms (AD). - Strong ideation and presentation skills that convince, sell, and inspire. - Proficiency in English (written & verbal). - Academic background in Advertising, Communications, Design, Copywriting, or equivalent experience.

title: Creative Director, ArtBuenos Aires
description: Creative Director, ArtBuenos AiresSHAREXLINKEDINEMAILCreative Director, Art About R/GA R/GA is a global digital innovation agency specializing in digital product development, brand transformation, media, and communications for major companies. We are on a mission to help companies grow by enabling them to change, across their business, the experience they offer and the campaigns that take them to market. Our work tends to be a fusion of what we call Stories and Systems: the narrative and the design, technology and the interface working together. R/GA is a brand but it's also a collective of atypical outsiders and misfits who drive everything we do through bold creativity and bright, strategic thinking. About the role R/GA are on the hunt for a future focused creative leader who can deliver world-class work that pushes the boundaries of creativity and craft. You’re fluent in concepting and collaborating, and have mastered the art of visual storytelling across multiple platforms and channels. You’re big on big ideas and comfortable selling your work, design thinking and concepts to clients at all levels. You’re passionate about growing the next generation of creative talent and confidently lead multidisciplinary teams to do the best work of their careers. You’re endlessly curious and inventive. Your concepts and executions are fresh, unexpected, strategic and always on brand. Our Creative Directors think for themselves, think for others, think for our clients and most importantly, think digitally and visually. Think about how people are interacting with new technology, from mobile devices to AI-powered interfaces and immersive environments, and find new ways for people to experience and shape our brands. You actively use AI as a creative partner — to generate ideas, prototype worlds, visualize concepts with the highest level of craft and push executions further, faster and smarter. Daily requirements can range from high-level thinking like defining visual platforms and campaign ecosystems, to the granular craft behind design systems, motion behaviors and every detail of a digital experience. Here’s what you should know if you want to be a Creative Director at R/GA: On any given day you might Manage the creative strategy and overall visual direction of client work Ensure the quality of work produced is in line with agency and client expectations Serve as the department leader and ensure the continued growth of the team Manage client relationships and work to deepen their knowledge of powerful marketing communications Identify the conceptual and strategic direction for various projects, integrating design, technology and AI, and clearly present those ideas to the team and the client The ideal person Is an extremely strong leader who can manage multiple clients and projects Has a nurturing approach to team members and is committed to showcasing their ideas and encouraging progression Has experience building ideas in a digital environment Has a background in art direction and is a fantastic visual storyteller Has ample experience working with and presenting to clients of all levels Has experience working collaboratively with multiple internal stakeholders/teams Has outstanding oral, written, and presentation skills Can look at corporate brands from a fresh angle Has a strong knowledge of interaction Design, technology, usability and experience design You Bring 8+ years of experience in advertising and/or digital media. Bachelor's degree in Advertising, Design, Visual Communication, or equivalent education and experience. description:
Art3D Animation Artist - Unpublished R&D Product (Contract)Guangzhou, ChinaJob Id: 6010职位概述 作为 3D 动作设计师（Contractor），你将加入我们的美术团队，负责为游戏角色、生物或道具制作高质量的关键帧动画（Keyframe Animation）。我们需要一位执行力强、基本功扎实的动画师。你不需要负责复杂的动捕数据清洗或底层的动画系统搭建，但你需要能独立承担一个角色或模块的动画量产工作，确保动画在引擎中表现流畅，并符合项目的艺术风格与玩法需求。 你将与玩法策划、技术美术紧密合作，通过动画赋予角色生命力，为玩家提供极致的打击感与操作反馈。 核心职责 高质量动画制作： 根据需求文档和分镜，使用 Maya 制作高质量的 3D 角色动画（包括但不限于：待机、移动、战斗技能、受击、死亡等）。 风格化表现： 深刻理解并还原项目的艺术风格（例如：美式卡通、强打击感、夸张变形等），确保动作设计符合角色性格（Acting）。 引擎集成与调试： 将动画资源导入游戏引擎（如 Unreal/Unity 或自研引擎），配置动画混合树（Blend Trees）、状态机（State Machines）基础设置，并能够在引擎内预览和验收效果。 玩法手感打磨： 与玩法策划紧密配合，通过调整动画的节奏（Timing/Spacing）和帧数，优化游戏的操作手感和响应速度（Gameplay Feel）。 Bug修复与优化： 负责维护和修复现有动画资源中的穿插、滑步、抖动等问题，确保交付资源的稳定性。 任职要求 经验要求： 3年以上游戏行业 3D 动画制作经验，至少参与过一款完整的游戏项目开发。 专业技能： 精通 Autodesk Maya 的动画模块。 深刻理解动画 12项基本法则（如挤压拉伸、预备动作、跟随动作等），尤其是在人体力学（Body Mechanics）和重量感表现上有扎实功底。 擅长 纯手K（Keyframe） 动画制作，能够处理风格化（Stylized）的角色动态。 沟通与协作： 具备良好的沟通能力（P2核心能力），能够准确理解反馈意见并快速迭代。 能够主动与上下游（策划/模型/特效）对齐需求，预判潜在的制作风险。 作品集： 必须提供 Demo Reel，展示涵盖肢体运动、战斗动作和表演片段的高质量作品。 加分项 引擎经验： 熟悉 Unreal Engine 或 Unity 的动画蓝图/系统。 技术理解： 了解基础的绑定（Rigging）知识，能进行简单的蒙皮（Skinning）修复或给 TA 提供有效的绑定反馈。 多风格适应： 既能驾驭写实风格，也能处理夸张卡通风格。 第一人称经验： 有 FPS（第一人称射击）武器与手部动画制作经验者优先。 用工性质：与专业人事服务公司FESCO Adecco签订劳动合同.Apply

title: Content Producer - LoL Esports
description:
Production GroupContent Producer - LoL EsportsSeoul, KoreaJob Id: REQ-0009768Riot Games was established in 2006 by avid gamers who believe that player-focused game development can result in great games. In 2009, Riot released its debut title League of Legends to critical and player acclaim. Players form the foundation of our community and it’s for them that we continue to evolve and improve the League of Legends experience, and beyond! We celebrated the 15th year of LoL esports at the 2025 World Championship and we hope to share many more great experiences to our players through esports. We’re looking for passionate professionals who share the same goal to make LoL esports even greater. That's where you come in. As a Content Producer - LoL Esports, you will report into Content Production Lead. You’ll be our Esports video visionary, creating and shepherding technically excellent, fun-heightened, player-approved, gameplay video content from conception to delivery, improving the quality bar for the Content Services Group in Korea. As a Rioter in Seoul, you’ll join a tight-knit group of exceptionally bright-minded individuals who share our prioritization of player experience, rejection of convention, and passion for gaming. Riot Games Korea is dedicated to creating tailored player experiences that show local players they aren’t lost in translation. Responsibilities: Coordinate with a variety of Esports technical, creative, and live broadcast teams, as well as other partners, to guide Esports gameplay video projects through post-production and deliver best-in-class industry results. Infuse creative and planning meetings with fresh ideas for new, electrifying Esports content that’ll blow players away. Take ownership of the defined creative vision and shape content from pre-production to delivery. Evaluate our Esports content, presenting new ways to improve our technical and editorial skills . Ability to manage stakeholder reviews, maintaining detailed communications throughout a video’s process from concept to delivery. Required Qualifications: Experienced: You have 5+ years of work experience as a producer in gaming, sports, or entertainment content production, with a proven ability to create and execute project plans and schedules. You bring strong knowledge of diverse project types (web, mobile, video, brand, strategic consulting) and the capability to develop and produce platform-specific content in a rapidly evolving content ecosystem. A creative story teller: you have the skill and the passion to craft compelling, authentic, and fresh narratives for Esports audiences. You possess production & project management experience with a reel or links demonstrating strong creative video content. A team player: you're open to performing any task, whether big or small; you're willing to teach and learn, lead, and follow. A culture-savvy enthusiast: Whether it’s NFL, NBA, MLB, or EPL, you have a broad interest and passion not only in sports but also entertainment, and cultural trends across the broader arts and culture landscape.You have a strong understanding of why audiences connect with certain cultural phenomena and apply those insights to content planning and storytelling. For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players. We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games. If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this could be your role!Apply

title: Director of Music Affairs / General Manager
description:
EntertainmentDirector of Music Affairs / General ManagerLos Angeles, USAJob Id: REQ-0009639Riot Games Music (RGM) has an in-house label and publisher that creates, licenses, releases, and manages a diverse catalog of music content for Riot Games' universe of titles and virtual artists, including VALORANT, League of Legends, K/DA, and Pentakill. We are dedicated to delivering world-class music experiences that deepen player immersion and expand the creative boundaries of gaming. Riot Games Music is seeking a seasoned and dynamic executive to take on the role of Director of Music Affairs and General Manager. This individual will be the driving force behind the recorded music and publishing efforts of RGM, overseeing all label operations and strategy. This is a critical leadership position requiring a deep understanding of the global music industry, exceptional business acumen, and a passion for managing and mentoring high-performing teams. Responsibilities: Label and Publishing Strategy & Operations: Develop and execute the overall strategy for RGM's recorded music releases and publishing catalog, ensuring alignment with Riot Games’ product, brand and content goals. Manage the operations for all label and publishing activities, driving revenue growth and operational efficiency. Establish and maintain best-in-class partnerships and processes for all aspects of the music business. Business Affairs & External Partnerships: Oversee all Business Affairs functions, including deal negotiation and execution for artist, producer, writer, and third-party partner agreements in partnership with Riot’s legal teams Manage existing and forge new strategic external partnerships with Tencent, major labels, distributors, PROs (Performing Rights Organizations), CMOs (Collective Management Organizations), and other key music industry stakeholders. Ensure RGM is compliant with all global music copyright, licensing, and regulatory requirements. Marketing & Partnerships: Direct the strategy for all RGM releases, working closely with internal Riot marketing teams and external partners to maximize global reach and fan engagement. Manage and support artist partnerships at the highest levels of the global industry to drive catalog growth and Riot’s products goals Royalty, Catalog, and Rights Administration: Supervise the administration of the RGM music catalog, including metadata management, content delivery, and registration with global rights organizations. Oversee all royalty accounting and reporting functions to ensure timely and accurate payments to artists, writers, and partners. Team Leadership & Management: Act as a General Manager, leading, mentoring, and developing a team of young professionals across various label functions (A&R, Operations, Marketing, Business Affairs). Foster a collaborative, innovative, and high-performance culture within the RGM team. Required Qualifications: 10-15 years of progressive leadership experience within the recorded music industry, with significant time spent in a label management or executive business affairs role. Deep expertise in music publishing, intellectual property law, and digital distribution. Experience in major Asian music markets including China and Korea Proven track record of success in negotiating complex music deals and managing multi-million dollar budgets. Extensive network of relationships within the global music, technology, and entertainment industries. Track record of implementing cutting edge tools to drive innovation and operational efficiencies Preferred Qualifications: Experience managing music operations for a video game company or adjacent media/entertainment property. Working knowledge of the gaming and esports ecosystem. Demonstrated ability to thrive in a fast-paced, creatively-driven, and entrepreneurial environment. For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players. We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games. If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this could be your role! Our Perks: Riot focuses on work/life balance, shown by our open paid time off policy and other perks such as flexible work schedules. We offer medical, dental, and life insurance, parental leave for you, your spouse/domestic partner, and children, and a 401k with company match. Check out our benefits pages for more information. At Riot Games, we put players first. That mission drives every decision in our quest to create games and experiences that make it better to be a player. Whether you’re working directly on a new player-facing experience or you’re supporting the company as a whole, everyone at Riot is part of our mission. And just like in our games, we’re better when we work together. Our goal is to create collaborative teams where you are empowered to bring your unique perspective everyday. If that sounds like the kind of place you want to work, we’re looking forward to your application. It’s our policy to provide equal employment opportunity for all applicants and members of Riot Games, Inc. Riot Games makes reasonable accommodations for handicapped and disabled Rioters and does not unlawfully discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, handicap, veteran status, marital status, criminal history, or any other category protected by applicable federal and state law.
